title: T-055 — Reference.GateChecklistTemplates table (NPD-f)
prompt:
# T-055 — GateChecklistTemplates table

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.10
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the Reference.GateChecklistTemplates table that stores per-tenant configurable gate checklist templates seeded onto each new npd_projects row at create-time.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0055_gate_checklist_templates.sql creates Reference.GateChecklistTemplates(template_id TEXT, tenant_id UUID, gate_code TEXT, category_code TEXT, item_text TEXT, required BOOLEAN, sequence INT, schema_version INT, PRIMARY KEY(tenant_id, template_id, gate_code, sequence)).
2. ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + tenant_isolation policy.
3. Drizzle schema in packages/db/src/schema/gate-checklist-templates.ts; barrel update.
4. Index (tenant_id, template_id, gate_code) for the seed-on-create query.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0055_gate_checklist_templates.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/gate-checklist-templates.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/gate-checklist-templates.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0055 runs, when \d "Reference.GateChecklistTemplates" runs, then it lists template_id + gate_code + category_code + item_text + required + sequence with composite PK and RLS enabled per §17.10 spec
2. Given two tenants seeded, when tenant A SELECT * FROM "Reference.GateChecklistTemplates" runs, then it returns only tenant A rows (RLS verified)
3. Given an INSERT with required=NULL is attempted, when the statement runs, then it fails NOT NULL constraint per §17.4 schema parity

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/gate-checklist-templates.test.ts asserting schema + RLS + NOT NULL before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test gate-checklist-templates'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip RLS
- Do not omit composite PK
- Do not seed default templates here (T-056)
